description: A family with young children is booking a flight and wants to ensure they can sit together.

nodes.task_description: During booking, identify that the passengers are a family traveling with children.
Scan the seat map for a block of adjacent seats large enough for the family.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds a row of available seats.

nodes.task_description: Assign the family to the adjacent seats, ensuring each child is seated next to an adult, in compliance with airline policy.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully assigns the family to seats together.
